mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (uid, password, birthDate, gender, name, phone, email, memberType, memberLevel, pointBalance, zipCode, addr1, addr2, regIp, createdAt) VALUES (#{uid}, #{password}, #{birthDate}, #{gender}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{memberType}, #{memberLevel}, #{pointBalance}, #{zipCode}, #{addr1}, #{addr2}, #{regIp}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT uid, password, birthDate, gender, name, phone, email, memberType, memberLevel, pointBalance, zipCode, addr1, addr2, regIp, createdAt FROM member WHERE uid = #{uid}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE uid = #{uid}
SELECT uid FROM member WHERE name = #{name} AND email = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE uid = #{uid} AND email = #{email}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET password = #{password} WHERE uid = #{uid}
UPDATE member SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, zipCode = #{zipCode}, addr1 = #{addr1}, addr2 = #{addr2} WHERE uid = #{uid}
